title: Enderman Vision Anger
description: Enderman now angry when peripheral vision.
body:
Endermen now get aggro'd within a greater region of your screen, instead of just the crosshair.

The dragon fight might actually require a carved pumpkin now.

There's also a config if you want to change the minimum dot product between the camera's look vector and the enderman's direction, lower means a greater radius from the crosshair.


mod id: endermenharder
